The '''Pentastar Talks''' were a series of meetings held on the [[Reaper (Executor-class)|''Reaper'']] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] between [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]] and various political and business leaders from the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]].

[[Elta Besk]], of the [[Dynamic Automata]], [[Ib Dekeet]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor]], [[Gregor Raquoran]], the [[Commerce Master Commissioner]] of the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]], and [[Wyrn Otro]] of [[Galentro Heavy Works]] were all present in the talks.

They resulted in the signing of the [[Pentastar Alignment Treaty]] and the establishment of the [[Pentastar Alignment]].
